metadata.description: Productivity-grade (Lite) Kiteworks agents for Claude — direct-MCP, best-effort. NOT the audited Kiteworks compliance runtime, not audit-defensible, and not a basis for deletion decisions.

plugins.name: kiteworks-document-summarizer
plugins.description: Find and summarize documents stored in Kiteworks (docx, pdf, pptx, xlsx, and text formats) directly in chat, with compliance-aware handling of sensitivity labels and PII.

plugins.name: kiteworks-duplicate-finder-lite
plugins.description: Best-effort direct-MCP duplicate report over Kiteworks folder metadata - groups files whose content fingerprint and size both match and shows the reclaimable space. Report only; nothing is moved or deleted. Productivity-grade and host-instruction-driven, not the audited compliance runtime.

plugins.name: kiteworks-retention-sweeper-lite
plugins.description: Best-effort direct-MCP scan of Kiteworks metadata for files past a retention threshold. Productivity-grade and host-instruction-driven - NOT the audited compliance runtime, not audit-defensible, and not a basis for deletion decisions.

plugins.name: kiteworks-storage-viz-lite
plugins.description: Best-effort direct-MCP storage summary over Kiteworks folder metadata - totals, largest folders/files, cleanup candidates. Productivity-grade and host-instruction-driven, not the audited compliance runtime.
